instructions: StarkZap is a Starknet SDK plus MCP server for agentic wallet operations. Prioritize critical correctness, security, and performance risks over style-only feedback. Focus on address normalization/validation, write-path opt-in safety for MCP tools, amount and decimal checks before transaction submission, sanitized client-facing errors, and backwards-compatible SDK API changes with tests.

rules.rule: All external addresses must be normalized and validated before use. Flag any direct unchecked address usage.
State-changing MCP tools must remain opt-in and explicitly gated. Default behavior should be read-only when write mode is not enabled.
Amounts and token decimals must be validated and bounded before submitting transactions.
Internal errors can be logged with detail, but client-facing responses must be sanitized and stable.
Changes to public SDK APIs should preserve backwards compatibility and include tests for behavior changes.
